name: Patterns & Sequences
description: Recognize, describe, and extend number patterns and sequences

name: Variables & Expressions
description: Understand variables, write and evaluate algebraic expressions

name: Equations & Inequalities
description: Solve linear equations and inequalities with one variable

name: Functions & Graphs
description: Understand functions, graph linear equations, interpret slope and intercepts

name: Systems of Equations
description: Solve systems of equations using graphing, substitution, and elimination

name: Polynomials & Factoring
description: Add, subtract, multiply polynomials and factor expressions

name: Quadratics
description: Solve quadratic equations and understand parabolas
